% Element length boundary tests (ESS-0000757: max 6 chars for Sys, Sub, Dis, Dev)
% VALID: 6-char elements (at boundary)
ABCDEF-010:EMR-TT-001:Temperature
DTL-ABCDEF:EMR-TT-001:Temperature
DTL-010:ABCDEF-TT-001:Temperature
DTL-010:EMR-ABCDEF-001:Temperature
% INVALID: 7-char elements (beyond boundary)
ABCDEFG-010:EMR-TT-001:Temperature
DTL-ABCDEFG:EMR-TT-001:Temperature
DTL-010:ABCDEFG-TT-001:Temperature
DTL-010:EMR-ABCDEFG-001:Temperature
% VALID: 1-char elements (minimum)
A-B:C-D-1:Temperature
% Edge: very long but valid property (25 chars exactly)
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:TempMaximumValueReadback
% Edge: property too long (26 chars)
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:TempMaximumValueReadbackX
